text: I feel an inquisitive energy here. I am surrounded by the sterile, orderly design of a lab or innovation space, and the colors strike me as both playful and serious. The concept of R+D—Research and Development—invites me to ponder humanity's relationship with technology. This place is an intersection of creation and reflection, a site where curiosity and progress meet. I am compelled to contemplate not only how we build, but why.
